user.title: TRMNL HA Climate Connector
user.description: Paste the webhook URL from your TRMNL plugin's Settings page (Plugins → your plugin → Webhook URL).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the webhook URL. Check that it is correct and that TRMNL is reachable.

abort.already_configured: This webhook URL is already configured.

data_description.push_interval: Defines how frequently this integration fetches fresh sensor data and pushes it to TRMNL. Independent of the TRMNL device Refresh Rate — both need to be set.
data_description.chart_count: How many charts to show below the sensor values.
data_description.chart_hours: How many hours of history to show (line and bar charts only).

data_description.chart1_areas: Leave empty to include all areas.

data_description.chart2_areas: Leave empty to include all areas.
